'''hazhadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyanization|kyanization]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-zh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyanization|kyanization]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hazhadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæzhædhæth|hæzhædhæth]] || [[word:hæzhædhæj|hæzhædhæj]] || [[word:hæzhædhæsh|hæzhædhæsh]] || [[word:hæzhædhæ|hæzhædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hazhazhadhath|hazhazhadhath]] || [[word:hazhazhadhaj|hazhazhadhaj]] || [[word:hazhazhadhash|hazhazhadhash]] || [[word:hazhazhadha|hazhazhadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hazhadhath|hazhadhath]] || [[word:hazhadhaj|hazhadhaj]] || [[word:hazhadhash|hazhadhash]] || [[word:hazhadha|hazhadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hazhafdhath|hazhafdhath]] || [[word:hazhafdhaj|hazhafdhaj]] || [[word:hazhafdhash|hazhafdhash]] || [[word:hazhafdhaf|hazhafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hazhadhatha|hazhadhatha]] || [[word:hazhadhaja|hazhadhaja]] || [[word:hazhadhasha|hazhadhasha]] || [[word:hazhadhaka|hazhadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hazhadhath|hazhadhath]] || [[word:hazhadhaj|hazhadhaj]] || [[word:hazhadhash|hazhadhash]] || [[word:hazhadha|hazhadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hazhadhathal|hazhadhathal]] || [[word:hazhadhajal|hazhadhajal]] || [[word:hazhadhashal|hazhadhashal]] || [[word:hazhadhakal|hazhadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hazhadhathatha|hazhadhathatha]] || [[word:hazhadhajaja|hazhadhajaja]] || [[word:hazhadhashasha|hazhadhashasha]] || [[word:hazhadhaka|hazhadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hazhadhathan|hazhadhathan]] || [[word:hazhadhajan|hazhadhajan]] || [[word:hazhadhashan|hazhadhashan]] || [[word:hazhadhakan|hazhadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hazhadhathaoro|hazhadhathaoro]] || [[word:hazhadhajaoro|hazhadhajaoro]] || [[word:hazhadhashaoro|hazhadhashaoro]] || [[word:hazhadhakaoro|hazhadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
